# Coliving Management (www.colivingjb.com)

# Product
Coliving Management is a web-based SaaS for coliving and room-by-room rental operators in Malaysia and Singapore: tenant portal, owner portal, operator dashboard, payments (Stripe/Xendit), agreements, smart access, and metered billing.

# Authoritative URLs
- Home / product: https://www.colivingjb.com/
- Pricing (operator plans MYR/SGD): https://www.colivingjb.com/pricing
- B2B enquiry: https://www.colivingjb.com/enquiry
- Property owners: https://www.colivingjb.com/for-owners
- Operator proposal: https://www.colivingjb.com/proposal
- Available units (public listings): https://www.colivingjb.com/available-unit

# Legal
- Privacy: https://www.colivingjb.com/privacy-policy
- Terms: https://www.colivingjb.com/terms-and-conditions

# Operator
ColivingJB Sdn Bhd — Coliving Management platform.
